description:
🕒 14:00–16:00

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Eco-Tourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-chokotto-tenranzan-syoka/

Walk with a guide and discover the subtle changes in nature you might miss on an ordinary walk. This is a short, easy-to-enjoy tour – come join us! Depending on the season, you may receive homemade organic vegetables as a gift.

【Fee】
¥2,000 per person, ¥1,500 for returning guests, ¥4,000 per family (includes guide and insurance)

【Capacity】
10 people

【Guide】
Tsubasa Kojima (Hanno City Eco-Tourism Citizen Guides Association, Wildlife Section)

【What to bring】
Drink, rain gear, backpack or similar (hands-free bags recommended), towel
location: 集合 飯能市立博物館前（国際興業バス「OH!!!・天覧山下」または「市民会館・博物館」下車徒歩3分）
